data.description:
## What
tests/interfaces/test_cli.py::test_reconcile_intercepted_dry_run_default ran a full reconcile against live Jira whenever acli is configured (it mocks nothing) — ~44s + real prod network on every default run. The interfaces tier has no network guard.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] The default routing check is hermetic (fake empty acli, no JIRA creds) and fast (<2s)
- [ ] A live-Jira reconcile dry-run exists as @pytest.mark.integration, excluded by 'not integration', runnable on demand (skips without acli)
- [ ] Default interface tier makes no live-Jira network calls
data.title: Separate live-Jira reconcile test from the default interface tier
